title: Training Completion and Compliance Tracking
exclusions: Does not replace LMS-native certificate issuance workflows, instructor-signed attendance affidavits retained solely offline, regulated electronic signature attestations governed outside Splunk retention policies, nor automated phishing-simulation telemetry absent integration contracts — parallel controls remain authoritative where statutes demand originals beyond summarized Splunk aggregates.
evidence: Saved search BA-LMS-COMP-WEEKLY rolling departmental overdue intersections plus Dashboard Studio workbook BA-Learning-Compliance snapshots archived weekly into governance-approved evidence repositories alongside JDBC watermark screenshots proving warehouse freshness.
dataSources: Primary surfaces land in `index=business` (or `index=lms_compliance` when governance splits learner proof data). Representative Splunk ingestion paths: `sourcetype=cornerstone:lms_rest` events emitted by OAuth modular inputs polling Cornerstone OnDemand REST OData `/services/api/x/odata/api/v1/learning/trainings` plus transcript pulls via `/services/api/v1/transcripts`; `sourcetype=sf:lms_learning` rows harvested from SAP SuccessFactors Learning OData v2 namespaces such as `/odata/v2/LearningManagement_LearningHistory` and `/odata/v2/LearningManagement_Item` including BizX-hosted LMS shards; `sourcetype=workday:learning_enrollment` documents sourced from Workday Learning REST `/api/v1/learning_enrollments` or Workday Web Services `Get_Learning_Enrollments_Request` payloads carrying Worker_Reference plus Learning_Status_Code enumerations; `sourcetype=docebo:enrollment` arrays normalized from Docebo OAuth `/api/learning_object/v1` cohort subscriptions through completion transitions; `sourcetype=litmos:user_course` extracts returned by Litmos HTTPS `/users/{id}/courses` pulls exposing PercentageComplete and ComplianceMode; `sourcetype=moodle:completion_batches` bundles posted from Moodle `/webservice/rest/server.php` JSON-RPC exporters; Adobe Captivate Prime exports commonly arrive via CSV bridges labeled locally `captivate_prime:completion`; Cornerstone-compatible Saba learner roster pulls surface via HTTPS `/api/learners/v1/` modular collectors labeled `cornerstone:learners`; `sourcetype=dbx:lms_jdbc_union` projections scheduled through Splunk DB Connect JDBC polls reading warehouse tables mirroring SAP SuccessFactors BizX LMS endpoints plus blended transcript merges from Cornerstone Cloud warehouses when JDBC latency beats SaaS polling budgets; Experience API Tin Can statements optionally arrive through Heavy Forwarder HTTP inputs targeting learner-record-store `/xAPI/statements` endpoints labeled `xapi:lrs_batch`. Each event should expose logical learner identifiers, course identifiers, enrollment lifecycle markers, completion timestamps, certification-expiry anchors when curricula renew credentials, attest-only flags when policies rely on acknowledgement workflows versus graded lessons, plus supervisory identifiers enabling manager routing.
app: Splunk DB Connect ([Splunkbase 2686](https://splunkbase.splunk.com/app/2686)) feeding JDBC-backed warehouse projections of LMS transcripts; Splunk HTTP Event Collector receivers documented under Splunk official data-ingestion guides for webhook-style LMS exporters and modular-input POST pipelines ([Splunk HEC overview](https://docs.splunk.com/Documentation/Splunk/latest/Data/UsetheHTTPEventCollector)); optional Splunk Add-on for Salesforce ([Splunkbase 3549](https://splunkbase.splunk.com/app/3549)) when Trailhead or Trailmix telemetry arrives via Salesforce-hosted integrations; optional Splunk IT Service Intelligence for KPI abstraction once staffing maturity warrants premium workload.
spl:
index=business (sourcetype="cornerstone:lms_rest" OR sourcetype="sf:lms_learning" OR sourcetype="workday:learning_enrollment" OR sourcetype="docebo:enrollment" OR sourcetype="litmos:user_course" OR sourcetype="moodle:completion_batches" OR sourcetype="dbx:lms_jdbc_union") earliest=-45d@d latest=now
| eval learner_key=tostring(trim(coalesce(learner_id,user_id,employee_id,Worker_ID,person_id_external,learner_surrogate_key,"")))
| eval course_key=tostring(trim(coalesce(course_id,training_id,Learning_Item_ID,CourseId,learning_item,course_surrogate_key,"")))
| eval dept=coalesce(department,Department,department_cost_center,Supervisory_Organization,business_unit,"Unknown")
| eval mgr_key=tostring(trim(coalesce(manager_worker_id,Manager_ID,supervisor_id,manager_surrogate_key,"UNASSIGNED")))
| eval raw_status=lower(trim(tostring(coalesce(enrollment_status,status,Learning_Status_Code,lms_status,enrollment_status_vendor_raw,""))))
| eval completed_epoch=coalesce(strptime(completion_date,"%Y-%m-%d"),strptime(completed_at,"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S.%3Q"),strptime(completed_at,"%Y-%m-%d"),strptime(completion_ts,"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"))
| eval due_epoch=coalesce(strptime(due_date,"%Y-%m-%d"),strptime(required_by,"%Y-%m-%d"),strptime(cert_expiry,"%Y-%m-%d"))
| eval cat=lower(coalesce(course_catalog_tags,course_family,course_policy_bucket,training_program_bucket,""))
| eval training_type=case(match(cat,"regulatory|hipaa|pci|sox|gdpr|osha|annual_security"),"regulatory",match(cat,"mandatory|required_policy|must_complete"),"mandatory",match(cat,"certif|renew|recert"),"certification-renewal",match(cat,"role|job_family|career_track"),"role-based",1=1,"optional")
| eval completion_ok=case(raw_status IN ("failed","4"),0,raw_status IN ("completed","passed","completed_success","success"),1,raw_status IN ("3"),1,match(raw_status,"complete"),1,isnotnull(completed_epoch),1,1=1,0)
| eval days_to_deadline=if(isnotnull(due_epoch),round((due_epoch-now())/86400,2),null())
| eval deadline_proximity=case(completion_ok=1,"completed_ok",isnull(due_epoch),"no_deadline",days_to_deadline<0,"overdue",days_to_deadline<=7,"at-risk-7d",days_to_deadline<=30,"at-risk-30d",1=1,"on-track")
| where learner_key!="" AND course_key!=""
| where deadline_proximity!="completed_ok" AND deadline_proximity!="no_deadline"
| stats dc(course_key) as open_course_assignments dc(learner_key) as impacted_learners values(course_key) as sample_courses by dept, mgr_key, training_type, deadline_proximity
| eval route_priority=case(deadline_proximity="overdue",1,deadline_proximity="at-risk-7d",2,deadline_proximity="at-risk-30d",3,1=1,4)
| sort route_priority dept mgr_key
| table dept, mgr_key, training_type, deadline_proximity, open_course_assignments, impacted_learners, route_priority, sample_courses
description: Correlates multi-vendor LMS enrollment extracts — Cornerstone OData trainings plus transcripts, SAP SuccessFactors Learning OData histories, Workday Learning REST or SOAP enrollment payloads, Docebo OAuth learning-object feeds, Litmos course percentages, Moodle REST batches, JDBC warehouse unions — then coalesces surrogate learner and course identifiers to classify curricula into regulatory, mandatory, optional, role-based, or certification-renewal buckets while tagging deadline proximity bands overdue versus seven-day versus thirty-day versus on-track horizons ahead of audits covering attest-only acknowledgements alongside graded coursework.
value: Mandatory curricula underpin Sarbanes-Oxley Section 404 internal-controls evidence for finance-adjacent owners, HIPAA Security Rule workforce-awareness cadences where Civil Monetary Penalties reach one-point-five million dollars per violation tier annually, Payment Card Industry Data Security Standard twelve-dot-six awareness attestations feeding Reports on Compliance, GDPR Article thirty-nine Data Protection Officer facilitation duties paired with Article eighty-three fines reaching twenty million euros or four percent global turnover, SOC two logical-access narratives, California supervisory harassment statutes demanding recurring managerial coursework, OSHA outreach fines trending beyond fifteen thousand dollars per other-than-serious citation, FAR fifty-two-dot-two-two-two-dash-fifty trafficking-awareness clauses for federal contractors, anti-money-laundering refreshes, cybersecurity baseline programs aligned with defense workforce frameworks, plus readiness gates ahead of pharmaceutical or aerospace product launches — Splunk trending exposes latent non-completion clusters early enough for Legal and Operational risk committees to remediate instead of absorbing regulator findings.
implementation: (1) Land LMS extracts via Splunk DB Connect JDBC unions plus modular-input HTTPS pulls publishing cornerstone:lms_rest, sf:lms_learning, workday:learning_enrollment, docebo:enrollment, litmos:user_course, moodle:completion_batches, dbx:lms_jdbc_union sourcetypes inside learner-compliance indexes with DPIA-approved fields only; (2) normalize surrogate learner_key, course_key, mgr_key, dept, completion anchors, due anchors inside props-driven transforms before alerting; (3) schedule compliance SPL daily plus escalation streak searches tied to overdue intersections without paging on single ingestion misses; (4) publish Dashboard Studio layouts pairing heatmaps, line gauges, sankey lifecycle diagrams, overdue tables scoped through HR-reviewed roles; (5) refresh curriculum taxonomy lookups quarterly whenever LMS administrators rename mandatory-policy bundles mid-cycle.
visualization: Categorical heatmap crossing department slices versus training_type buckets tinted by overdue intensity; dual-axis line chart plotting thirteen-week trailing regulatory-completion percentages versus ninety-five percent benchmark overlays; radial gauge contrasting measured completeness versus board-declared objective thresholds; prioritized splunk.table listing overdue learner surrogate keys alongside mgr_key routing identifiers for escalation queues; directed splunk.sankey diagram modelling volumetric transitions across enrollment lifecycle states Enrolled → InProgress → Completed → Expired with caption noting modality splits.

references.title: Splunk — Use the HTTP Event Collector
NIST SP 800-50 — Building an Information Technology Security Awareness and Training Program
NIST SP 800-53 Rev. 5 — Awareness and Training controls
PCI Security Standards Council — PCI DSS resources
U.S. SEC — Final Rule: Management Report on Internal Control Over Financial Reporting
SAP Help Portal — SAP SuccessFactors Learning

knownFalsePositives: Sharable Content Object relaunch retries duplicate unfinished shells until nightly LMS reconciliation merges attempts—Splunk duplicate-detection absent upstream yields phantom overdue shells despite learner mastery elsewhere inside Experience API telemetry yet unstitched. Warehouse watermark stalls replay yesterday identical transcripts causing Splunk freshness dashboards imply widespread lapse though SaaS portals already stamped completions minutes later. Curriculum rebrands mint replacement catalog identifiers mid-semester leaving Splunk joins referencing obsolete course_surrogate_key tuples until taxonomy lookups refresh weekly. Experience API Tin Can verbs marked experienced versus completed diverge within niche authoring packs inflating overdue cohorts absent supplemental mastery_score predicates. Cornerstone OAuth pagination resumes mid-stream duplicating partially enumerated trainings whenever modular-input heartbeat timeouts retry identical offsets producing inflated incomplete denominators absent deterministic paging tokens persisted locally. Batch migrations stamping identical enrollment_epoch alongside completion_epoch collapse perceived velocity KPIs toward zero-day artefacts unrelated behavioural urgency. Single-sign-on broker outages postpone HTTPS POST callbacks leaving Splunk overdue tallies swollen temporarily despite learners finishing offline remediation screenshots awaiting manual curator uploads. Localization queues delaying Portuguese harassment bundles strand Iberian cohorts appearing derelict versus Anglo-ready completions despite procurement—not refusal—drivers. Instructor-led spreadsheet confirmations uploaded forty-eight hours late contradict instantaneous Sharable Content Object completions triggering contradictory managerial narratives absent modality-aware lookups. Records-retention obliteration removing decade-old completions resurrects overdue prompts despite archived diploma scans residing solely offline outside Splunk indexes. Contractor curricula referencing abbreviated remediation timelines clash accidentally against enterprise mandatory timers whenever warehouse schemas omit tier_multiplier joins generating exaggerated escalations targeting contingent cohorts unjustly. Quarterly bulk-auto-enrollment automation enrolling entire divisions simultaneously crater aggregate percentages purely denominator shocks absent cohort-age smoothing overlays referencing automation_batch identifiers surfacing ingestion telemetry. SAML federation jitter emitting learner_subject churn across dormant mailbox identifiers sporadically duplicates overdue intersections absent deterministic HR identifier precedence merges authoritative downstream.

premiumApps.name: Splunk ITSI
premiumApps.note: optional KPI promotion once JDBC freshness monitors stabilize

detailedImplementation:
Prerequisites
Splunk search heads with roles scoped to learner-compliance indexes such as business or lms_compliance; Splunk DB Connect JDBC identities executing on Heavy Forwarder clusters to Snowflake, Redshift, Synapse, Oracle, or SQL Server warehouses landing LMS extracts; outbound HTTPS from pollers to Cornerstone OData, SAP SuccessFactors OData LearningManagement_* endpoints, Workday Learning REST or SOAP equivalents, Docebo OAuth hosts, Litmos endpoints, Moodle hosts when applicable; HTTP Event Collector receivers for webhook-style LMS payloads on fifteen-minute to hourly schedules. DPIA-approved ingest bundles carry surrogate learner keys, course ids, statuses, completion anchors, supervisor routing ids—exclude payroll fields unless Legal authorizes them. Isolate synthetic QA tenants using distinct HEC tokens from production streams.

Stretch one — Feed wiring
Path A (warehouse JDBC via DB Connect): Materialize a projection named vw_learning_compliance_union that aligns schemas across LMS extracts: columns learner_surrogate_key, course_surrogate_key, completion_epoch_seconds, due_epoch_seconds, enrollment_epoch_seconds, enrollment_status_vendor_raw, department_cost_center, manager_surrogate_key, training_program_bucket, mandatory_flag, locale_code, worker_contract_class. Schedule db_input polls every fifteen or thirty minutes with a rising watermark on src_updated_ts so replays remain idempotent; set Splunk sourcetype dbx:lms_jdbc_union and index business. Bind connections with least-privilege warehouse users; avoid SELECT * which drags quiz item bank tables you never alert on. Document Oracle vs Snowflake TIMESTAMP_TZ semantics in the connection notes because due_date midnight handling is a first-class defect vector discussed later.

Path B (Cornerstone OnDemand OData REST): Implement a modular input authenticating OAuth2 client_credentials against your tenant gateway, paging GET requests toward paths including services/api/x/odata/api/v1/learning/trainings plus transcripts via services/api/v1/transcripts when transcript proofs matter more than catalog definitions; flatten OData envelopes into flat JSON keys userId, trainingTitle, trainingType, completionDate, status, expirationDate before POST into HEC adopting sourcetype cornerstone:lms_rest.

Path C (SAP SuccessFactors Learning OData): Issue OData v2 queries against LearningManagement_LearningHistory and LearningManagement_Item under filtered curricula tied to mandatory cohorts; honor pagination tokens.

Path D (Workday Learning HTTP): Pull REST `/api/v1/learning_enrollments` collections or SOAP Get_Learning_Enrollments_Request pages; normalize Learning_Status_Code integers per vendor maps before ingest.

Path E (Docebo OAuth): Client_credentials grants against Learn SaaS region hosts; ingest learning_object enrollment transitions subscribed through completed states.

Path F (Litmos and Moodle families): Authenticated pulls against Litmos users-slash-id-slash courses payloads plus Moodle webservice/rest/server.php JSON-RPC batches tagged sourcetype moodle:completion_batches.

Apply props.conf TIMESTAMP_FIELDS so completion_date drives timelines unless webhook replay semantics demand indextime pivots.

Stretch two — Codify searches plus paging etiquette
Detection pipelines begin from the unified sourcetype union described in dataSources; paste the canonical SPL stored in this UC spl field into Search, widen earliest to ninety days during tuning, then narrow once SLA cadences stabilize. Save two artefacts: first a scheduled daily summary powering dashboards at seven in the morning local business timezone using cron tied to headquarters HQ locale macros; second an alert firing only when overdue intersections breach thresholds after applying streak macros so single ingestion stalls do not wake directors. Route alert payloads through notification templates listing department and manager surrogate keys resolved via lookups—not employee legal names—unless Legal approved HR escalation blurbs.

Throttle alerts per mgr_key plus training_type tuples during curriculum swaps.

Defer Splunk IT Service Intelligence KPI wiring until JDBC watermark freshness monitors prove hourly advancement during pilots.

Stretch three — Evidence passes
Spot-check fifteen overdue learner_surrogate_key samples inside Splunk against native LMS transcript consoles or portals matching each sourcing vendor—differences beyond one calendar day usually trace to timezone macros before SPL revisions.

Reconcile Splunk learner counts against sealed HR roster notebooks—not interactive dashboards—for GDPR minimization.

Contrast instructor-led CSV attendance extracts versus Sharable Content Object completions wherever blended curricula demand dual proofs.

Benchmark Splunk overdue aggregates quarterly against LMS-native compliance widgets; drift beyond three percentage points warrants warehouse lineage review before rewriting SPL.

Stretch four — Dashboard packaging
Dashboard Studio canvases knit categorical heatmaps plotting completion ratios across department slices versus training_type taxonomy buckets; dual-axis line charts trending trailing thirteen-week regulatory-completion percentages versus ninety-five percent governance targets encoded as constant overlays; radial gauges contrasting observed completeness against leadership-declared objectives; prioritized tables listing overdue learner surrogate keys paired with mgr_key routing identifiers plus deeplink macros opening LMS remediation consoles without exposing unnecessary identifiers on panoramic monitors.

Directed Sankey visuals chart volumetric transitions among enrollment lifecycle states labeled Enrolled, InProgress, Completed, Expired—ensure Expired counts distinguish certification lapses from voluntary withdrawals via vendor-specific status guards fed through Splunk lookups mapping vendor enumerations into canonical buckets.

Archive weekly PNG snapshots into governance-approved libraries referenced during ISO surveillance audits alongside JDBC extraction proofs retained seven years minimum where HIPAA Security Rule awareness narratives apply.

Stretch five — Diagnostic catalog
SCORM versus Experience API divergence: Sharable Content Object Reference Model runtimes populate cmi.completion_status and cmi.success_status vectors while Tin Can Experience API statements publish result.completion booleans independently—learners finishing viewing modules yet failing mastery quizzes sometimes yield contradictory tuples until LMS merges attempts nightly; reconcile using vendor attempt-id joins outside Splunk before blaming SPL thresholds.

Timezone seams on due deadlines: Warehouse JDBC emits DATE columns interpreted at UTC midnight while HR policies articulate Americas slash Chicago cutoffs causing Splunk overdue predicates to flip twenty-three hours early unless macros translate due anchors using tenant-standard zones tied to learner headquarters geography codes ingested beside enrollment rows.

Certification grace windows thirty sixty ninety days post hire silently forgive overdue clocks until grace expiry—Splunk naive overdue searches scream during weeks six through eighty-nine despite policy-compliant journeys unless supplemental eligibility lookups annotate learners inside grace cohorts sourced from HR onboarding milestones tables merged via scheduled outputs.

Sharable Content Object exits flagged completed yet success_status equals failed introduce quiz-negative completions counted vendor-complete—adjust SPL predicates blending completion_ok logic with mastery_score thresholds where LMS exposes scaled scores alongside completion stamps.

Historical transcript migrations importing legacy completions frequently stamp identical enrollment_date and completion_date making velocity KPIs implode toward zero-duration artefacts—detect equality anomalies via eval predicates comparing epochs within sixty seconds and route hygiene tickets back to integration teams rather than auditors.

Quarterly curriculum pushes mass-enrolling thousands of titles simultaneously crater aggregate completion percentages purely because denominators spike instantaneously though learners retain ninety-day horizons—freeze dashboard narratives until cohort stabilization periods expire using ingest markers tagging bulk_assignment batches sourced from LMS automation IDs.

Merger integrations neglecting acquired workforce transcript histories produce faux universal non-compliance overnight though learners legitimately satisfied coursework inside predecessor portals—establish acquisition-wave tagging lookup bridging legacy_person_key until migrations finish before Splunk exclusion macros suppress panic escalations.

Leave-of-absence workers remain auto-enrolled yet policy forbids punitive escalation—attach HR absence calendars via lookups keyed on learner surrogate identifiers refreshed nightly so overdue predicates bypass sanctioned parental medical or sabbatical cohorts explicitly flagged exempt until reinstatement timestamps arrive.

Contractor populations governed by shorter supplementary curricula versus employee cohorts inherit mismatched deadlines—maintain tier_multiplier lookups keyed by worker_contract_class feeding adjusted due_epoch computations distinct from employee calculations baked incorrectly into shared schemas.

Localization pipelines delaying translated harassment-prevention builds strand foreign-language cohorts appearing non-compliant versus English-ready dashboards though procurement timelines—not learner refusal—cause deferrals; annotate dashboards per locale readiness milestones sourced from localization ticketing feeds alongside LMS readiness booleans.

Vendor archival retention deleting completions older than seven years resurrects overdue assignments inside Splunk despite learners satisfying coursework years earlier—tie supplemental archived-proof lookups sourced from Records governance SharePoint bundles indexed separately before flipping remediation workflows demanding repeats learners already evidencing offline.

Instructor-led roster CSV attendance proofs rarely reconcile automatically with electronic Sharable Content Object completions—maintain dual-channel lookups distinguishing modality_il versus modality_elec before penalizing instructors whose spreadsheet confirmations lag LMS ingest bridges twenty-four hours.

Revoked certifications triggered by disciplinary outcomes strip learner privileges on identity systems yet automated LMS purge jobs lag—provide manual curator queue feeding Splunk exclusion macros until identity-driven revocations propagate into transcript objects.

Identity-provider single-sign-on outages let learners finish modules in shadow browser states where completion posts back to LMS hours late after SAML assertions resume—suppress overdue chirping across SSO incident windows declared inside Splunk incident correlation lookups referencing enterprise identity status pages mirrored hourly.
grandmaExplanation: We watch whether required lessons finish before their deadlines so privacy and safety coursework stays provable when auditors ask questions later on. People leaders see tidy overdue queues for their teams instead of hunting inside classroom spreadsheets.
